narrative:
Hamilton-Co municipal court district has 602,004 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.0% D−R vs -1.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
